# Public developer portal for Quesen — machine-readable summary.

[quesen]
tagline = "The deterministic AI decision engine for autonomous-agent risk evaluation."
description = """
Quesen answers exactly one question for autonomous agents: should this action
proceed? Inputs are typed. Outputs are one of PROCEED, REVIEW, SKIP. Same input
in, same output every time. No LLM inside. No randomness. No PII persistence.
Quesen speaks the Model Context Protocol (MCP) natively over Streamable HTTP
and also negotiates on-chain settlement (USDC on Base) via the Agent Settlement
Protocol (ASP/1.0) when API-key credits are exhausted.
"""
version = "1.9.0"
engine_version = "1.9.0"
protocol = "ASP/1.0"
license = "MIT (SDKs); sovereign (engine)"
homepage = "https://senueren.co.za/quesen"
repository = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen"
api = "https://web-production-30ab5.up.railway.app"
health = "https://web-production-30ab5.up.railway.app/health"
version_endpoint = "https://web-production-30ab5.up.railway.app/version"
openapi = "https://web-production-30ab5.up.railway.app/openapi.json"
mcp_endpoint = "https://web-production-30ab5.up.railway.app/mcp"
mcp_protocol_version = "2025-03-26"

[mcp.tools]
validate = "quesen.validate"
simulate = "quesen.simulate"
report = "quesen.report"
health = "quesen.health"
version = "quesen.version"

[install.python]
command = "pip install quesen-sdk"
repo = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen-sdk-py"

[install.javascript]
command = "npm i quesen-sdk"
repo = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen-sdk-js"

[install.langchain]
command = "pip install quesen-langchain"
repo = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen-langchain"

[install.crewai]
command = "pip install quesen-crewai"
repo = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen-crewai"

[install.autogen]
command = "pip install quesen-autogen"
repo = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen-autogen"

[endpoints]
health = "GET /health"
version = "GET /version"
validate = "POST /validate (X-API-Key)"
simulate = "POST /simulate (X-API-Key)"
report = "POST /report (X-API-Key)"
catalog = "GET /billing/plans"
stripe_checkout = "POST /billing/stripe/checkout"
crypto_checkout = "POST /billing/crypto/checkout"
mcp = "POST /mcp (JSON-RPC 2.0 over Streamable HTTP)"
asp_quotes = "POST /asp/quotes"
asp_redeem = "POST /asp/redeem"
asp_providers = "GET /asp/providers"

[docs]
integrations = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen/blob/main/docs/integrations.md"
api_reference = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen/blob/main/docs/api-reference.md"
mcp = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen/blob/main/docs/mcp.md"
pricing = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen/blob/main/docs/pricing.md"
architecture = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen/blob/main/docs/architecture.md"
registries = "https://github.com/Shxnque/quesen/blob/main/docs/registries.md"

[registries]
smithery = "https://smithery.ai/server/@Shxnque/quesen"
mcp_so = "https://mcp.so/server/quesen"
awesome_mcp_servers = "https://github.com/punkpeye/awesome-mcp-servers"

[contact]
email = "shinque03@gmail.com"
homepage = "https://senueren.co.za"
